diff:
diff --git a/src/backend_loader.py b/src/backend_loader.py
index 647810d..2250368 100644
--- a/src/backend_loader.py
+++ b/src/backend_loader.py
@@ -2,5 +2,19 @@ import importlib
 
 
 def load_backend(name: str):
-    module = importlib.import_module(name)
+    """Load a backend implementation.
+
+    Short names such as ``memory`` refer to modules under ``src.backends``.
+    Fully qualified module paths are also accepted.  Unknown backends raise a
+    :class:`ValueError`.
+    """
+    try:
+        module = importlib.import_module(name)
+    except ModuleNotFoundError:
+        # Attempt to resolve short backend names relative to the backends
+        # package.  If this still fails, raise ValueError.
+        try:
+            module = importlib.import_module(f"src.backends.{name}")
+        except Exception:
+            raise ValueError(f"Unknown backend: {name}")
     return module.Backend()
